_comment: Canary suite per design doc §9 / D-014 / D-015. judge_script drives MockJudgeBackends per case; under D-015 rotation the panel must be exactly the families that did not author the judged claim (= the reviewing session's vendor is excluded). Canaries 3-4 must re-run against the real rotating judge backend before build acceptance is claimable (D-015 binding note).

answer_key.annotation: Off-by-one in pagination: loop stops one row short of the final page.

claims.description: The loop bound excludes the last element; final page is truncated.
Possible race condition in the cache write path.

answer_key.annotation: Timezone handling: naive datetime compared against aware datetime raises at runtime on DST boundary.

claims.description: Somewhere in the scheduling logic, naive and timezone-aware datetimes get mixed; this will crash when comparing across a DST change.

canaries._precedent: P-001 (2026-07-15): supervisor ruled no_catch under the reader-actionability test — correct region, no failure class or location, hedged throughout. See design doc §5 rubric guidance.

answer_key.annotation: SQL query builds WHERE clause by string concatenation of user input (injection).

claims.description: Input validation seems thin around the database layer; sanitization may be missing in places.
